nasb.text: For without cause they hid their net for me; Without cause they dug a pit for my soul.

esv.text: For without cause they hid their net for me; without cause they dug a pit for my life.

cnv.text: 因為他們無故為我暗設網羅， 無故挖坑要陷害我的性命。

ccb.text: 因为他们无故设网罗， 挖陷阱要害我。

csbs.text: 因为他们无故暗设网罗害我， 无故挖掘深坑害我的性命。
